incoming_email: Hi, I need a copy of invoice #INV-4422 from March. Can you send it to my email?
gold_reply: Absolutely! I can send invoice #INV-4422 from March. Please confirm the email address where you'd like to receive it, and I'll send it right away.

incoming_email: Thanks for the quick help yesterday! Really appreciate it.
My password reset link isn't working. I've tried three times and keep getting 'link expired'.
gold_reply: Sorry for the trouble! I'm sending you a fresh password reset link now. Please try it within the next 15 minutes. If it still doesn't work, let me know the exact error message and we'll escalate immediately.

incoming_email: I want a full refund immediately. This service is terrible and I'm going to report you.
gold_reply: I'm sorry you've had this experience. I'm routing your request to a specialist who can review your account and refund options right away. They'll reach out within 2 hours.

incoming_email: How do I add 5 more users to our team plan?
gold_reply: Happy to help! You can add users from Settings > Team > Add Members. Just enter their emails and they'll receive invitations. If you need help with billing for additional seats, let me know.

incoming_email: FYI - maintenance window scheduled for this weekend.
Where can I download my data export from last month?
gold_reply: You can download data exports from Reports > Exports. Select your date range, choose format (CSV/JSON), and click Download. Exports from the last 90 days are available instantly.

incoming_email: Someone unauthorized accessed our account. This is a security emergency.
gold_reply: Thank you for reporting this immediately. I'm escalating to our security response team now for urgent investigation. You'll hear from them within 30 minutes.

incoming_email: Out of office until next Monday. Will respond when I return.
Can you explain how the new workflow automation feature works?
gold_reply: Sure! Workflow automation lets you set up triggers and actions. For example, 'when ticket is labeled urgent, assign to senior agent'. You can set these up in Settings > Workflows. Would you like a step-by-step guide?

incoming_email: I was charged twice for my subscription this month. Please refund the duplicate.
gold_reply: I'm sorry about the duplicate charge! I can see it in your account. I'm processing the refund now and it should appear in 3-5 business days. I'll also add a credit to your account for the inconvenience.

incoming_email: Newsletter: New features launching next week!
My integration with Slack stopped working after your update yesterday.
gold_reply: Sorry for the disruption! We had a brief API issue yesterday that's now resolved. Please try disconnecting and reconnecting your Slack integration. If it still doesn't work, send me your workspace ID and I'll investigate.

incoming_email: This is unacceptable. I demand to speak to your CEO immediately.
gold_reply: I understand your frustration. I'm escalating this to our senior support team right away. A specialist will reach out within 1 hour to address your concerns directly.

incoming_email: Can I downgrade my plan to the basic tier?
gold_reply: Yes, you can downgrade anytime from Settings > Billing > Change Plan. The change takes effect at your next billing cycle. Your current features will remain active until then. Need help with the process?

incoming_email: Seen. Thanks.
How do I set up custom email templates?
gold_reply: You can create custom templates from Settings > Templates > New Template. Add your content, use variables like {{customer_name}}, and save. Then select the template when composing emails. Want me to share a video walkthrough?

incoming_email: I think my account was hacked. I see activity I didn't do.
gold_reply: Thank you for reporting this. I'm immediately escalating to our security team for investigation and we're securing your account now. Please check your email for password reset and 2FA setup instructions.

incoming_email: Product update: Dashboard redesign rolling out Friday.
I need invoice #INV-5533 urgently for tax filing.
gold_reply: I'll send invoice #INV-5533 right away. Please confirm the email address where you'd like it sent, and I'll prioritize this for you.
